# openwifi Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-05

## Active Technologies

- Bash 5.x (all new skills); Python 3.11 (inherited jira/confluence scripts) + sshpass or ssh-agent (server-build, upgrade-dut); uv (jira Python scripts); pymupdf4llm (KB conversion); git (KB commit/push) (001-openwifi-skills)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

cd src [ONLY COMMANDS FOR ACTIVE TECHNOLOGIES][ONLY COMMANDS FOR ACTIVE TECHNOLOGIES] pytest [ONLY COMMANDS FOR ACTIVE TECHNOLOGIES][ONLY COMMANDS FOR ACTIVE TECHNOLOGIES] ruff check .

Bash 5.x (all new skills); Python 3.11 (inherited jira/confluence scripts): Follow standard conventions
